_note: WhatsApp/session-hygiene wiring (group_id/group_ids/group_names/require_mention/listen-only/session_hygiene) is NOT here — it lives in shared/registry.json, the single source of truth (registry v2). No code reads bot.json wiring anymore. To wire this agent to a group: edit shared/registry.json (add the group to the top-level `groups` map + the agent's `groups`/`listenGroups`), run `node shared/tools/registry-sync.mjs --check` then `--apply`, then restart the gateway while chat is idle. bot.json holds domain config only.

drive._note: rclone remote 'gdrive' is a READ-ONLY Google service account. root_folder_id (your shared Drive folder) is baked into the remote, so folder='' = the shared-folder root. The SA key lives OUTSIDE the repo at ~/.openclaw/secrets/gdrive-sa.json (chmod 600). Create with: rclone config create gdrive drive scope=drive.readonly service_account_file=<key> root_folder_id=<id> export_formats=pdf
